title: How Itakh Was Killed
description: It is reported that, when ltakh left Mecca heading back to Iraq, alMutawakkil sent to him Said b. $alih the Chamberlain286 with attire and precious gifts, ordering Said to meet Itakh in al-Kufah or somewhere along his route. Al-Mutawakkil had already broached his order concerning Itakh to his chief of security police in Baghdad.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
